\tzpentry{ID11405}{Portal Phi Force Ratio}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The portal analysis tracks the ratio of surface-tension force to inertial force as a candidate convergence toward the golden ratio.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\phi_{\mathrm{ratio}}=\frac{F_{s}}{F_{i}}
